description: HISTORIPII I k The Heralds subscription list has increased 25 per cent the past winter A poitettoffiYaclvertisers Sauk Centre Herald r Vol XXXI No SZ SAUK CENTRE STEARNS COUNTY MINN APRIL 14 1898 Whole No 1602 A SENATE REPORT Barbarous Conduct of Warfare and Mnrder of Old Men Wo Washington April 141 n view of the general announcement that the foreign committees of the two houses would make their reports on the Cuban question the early attendance of the public was surprisingly small There was only a handful of people at each f the galleries when they were opened at 9 oclock and it was almost noon be fore the galleries were filled Those who secured the front seats in the sen ate gallery held them persistently how ever under the conviction that the day Jhad in it more possibilities in the way of excitement and possible development than any preceding day The senate committee did not begin business until 11 oclock and the meet ing was said to be merely formal as the essential work of preparing its report and formulating the resolutions to be presented had been practically com pleted There was some additions to the report on
